feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: Wait for me to come Home
entry.summary:
Author: NCW_46

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,132Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 55

Summary: Captain Mehta needs a mentor for his new reckless probie for a few months. Enter Eddie Diaz. An exploration of the unintentional isolation of Eddie Diaz, his disposition to help without expecting anything in return, the firefam facing the possibility of losing Eddie to another firehouse, and the Buckley-Diazes redefining their family beyond the firehouse. Title from Photograph by Ed Sheeran

entry.title: I’ll be there for you
entry.summary:
Author: stargazingstormtrooper92

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,716Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: Buck hip checks Eddie. ‘’You good?’’‘’Yeah. I was just looking forward at quiet Sunday afternoon at the house, not this.’’‘’Quiet Sunday afternoon?’’ Buck chuckles. ‘’When on Earth do you and Christopher have quiet Sunday afternoons? You usually blast aliens on the TV or play Mario Kart.’’Eddie pouts. ‘’Hey, that’s quiet.’’‘’Sure,’’ Buck smirks.‘’Don’t be smug. Not everyone can be a master chef like you.’’Buck leaves the knife on the board and turns to Eddie, faking offence. ‘’What? Me, a master chef? If you haven’t noticed I’m scared shitless I won’t recognize when the dish is done because Pepa keeps saying ‘it’s over until it’s over’ and ‘just a cup of flour’ but when I ask which cup she says ‘the blue one’. The blue one is not a measuring unit Eddie. I literally have no idea what I’m doing.’’Eddie shrugs his shoulders then lifts a piece of carrot he just peeled to Buck’s mouth so he can snack on it. ‘’You’re doing fine. I’m on peeling duty. You’re on seasoning duty.’’***Or: touch starved Eddie Diaz, that’s it. That’s the fic. 5+1 fic, five times Eddie seeks out comfort in Buck no questions asked and one time Theo does it instead. Cute, soft, fluffy ❤️🥹

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 293,520Chapters: 61/?Kudos: 126

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: From Horror to Horror
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,209Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Maddie and Doug are spending the day at Hersheypark. At the end of the day, as they are leaving Hersheypark, Maddie gets kidnapped. Maddie doesn’t have much fight in her as she knows if she does get out of this she is just going back to her life with Doug. Eventually she manages to fight back and she makes it out of there alive. But trying to heal from her trauma from the kidnapping is hard enough on its own and it feels completely impossible when she is still with Doug and he blames her for getting kidnapped and gets mad at her for struggling to cope.

entry.title: What's Past Is Prologue
entry.summary:
Author: Duochanfan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,309Chapters: 4/63Kudos: 137

Summary: Moving to LA with Shannon and Christopher was supposed to save his marriage. But Eddie Diaz is facing more than just recovery from his injuries in the sandbox. A chance meeting with former Navy SEAL Evan Buckley, and life takes a strong turn as the two rekindle a friendship that had begun in the sandbox, and their future starts to look just that little bit brighter.

entry.title: Stop, Drop...and Grind?
entry.summary:
Author: FyrestoneSiren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,585Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 221

Summary: It was supposed to be one charity show.One harmless, slightly raunchy firefighter-themed performance for a good cause. Then Buck pulled Eddie into a world of poles, suspenders, body oil, and smouldering tension that had no business being this hot. Two firefighters walk into a strip club. Only one walks out emotionally intact. (Spoiler: it’s not Eddie.) Originally posted: 10/07/2025 Re-edited and remastered: 06/06/2026

entry.title: Where Equipment Failure Leads
entry.summary:
Author: SociallyAwkwardWeirdo25

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,532Chapters: 4/9Kudos: 24

Summary: Buck knew B Shift had been rough on the gear, it was mentioned during hand over, but he hadn't expected only one working harness for a cliffside rescue. Or anything that came after the harness snapped and he fell to the water below. But how was he to expect a Pod of man-hating Mermaids or that they couldn't just let him leave?   What was that about a Moon Pool?

entry.title: Leave Me Alone, Punk
entry.summary:
Author: MaskedmenMaruaders

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,842Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 133

Summary: "Buck." Eddie repeated, shocked by how easily it rolled off his tongue. "Strange name." "Y- Yeah, I get that a lot." "Suits you." Buck's eyes widened in surprise and Eddie swore he heard his breath hitch. "Thanks." Buck mumbled, rubbing the back of his neck as blush crept in. "But I should go- Class and all that. Uh, enjoy. Or don't. I gotta go." Eddie watched him leave, standing in the same spot he'd first seen Buck and left with more questions than answers. OR Buddie age gap fic.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: First Dates
entry.summary:
Author: lovelyluke

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 190,224Chapters: 9/10Kudos: 332

Summary: “You really like him, don’t you?” Eddie asks, a tired smile still plastered on his face.“Yes,” Christopher nods “I like Mr.Buck very much, and you too.” He giggles.“Oh, you like me very much too?”“No, you like Mr.Buck too.”“I like Mr.Buck?” Eddie laughs, confused.“Yes, you asked him on a date” Christopher explains as if it was obvious, silly daddy.“I… I asked him on a date?” Eddie asks, still very confused.“You did Dad, just now.”Or, Eddie is slowly falling for Christopher's teacher

entry.title: Kiss me, Cowboy
entry.summary:
Author: It_aint_normal

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,721Chapters: 5/12Kudos: 9

Summary: Eddie is a hard working father he does what his best for him and Chris and he doesn't think buck is what’s best for him. An unwelcoming man walking into town like nothing and everyone seems to loves him except Eddie. “Welcome, our new recruit, Buck.” “This is bullshit.” WARNING! entry.title: Of Kidnappings, Cherry Red Suckers, Apocalypse Apologies, & a Giant Bag Full of....
entry.summary:
Author: Firefawn

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,810Chapters: 7/15Kudos: 1,086

Summary: If Buck thought the aftermath of the lawsuit was bad, it had nothing – absolutely nothing – on the Winchesters barreling into his life, finding out the apocalypse was imminent, that his own death was a seal, and a demon hitting on him. He really should have realized that when an angel shows up to stop you from throwing yourself off a bridge, that it isn’t always a good thing.----After the lawsuit, Buck is back at work, hoping to reconcile. Only...it doesn't go as planned. His family hates him and after a lifetime of rejection it's one hit too many. Buck plans his goodbye…only a certain angel stops him, 'borrows' him, hands him the Winchester-patented starter's guide to hunting manual, and gives him purpose again. Too bad that angel was so busy saving Buck, they forgot about the goodbye letters left in the loft.---Buck rubbed at the bridge of his nose tiredly. "I'm pretty sure this is kidnapping." Dean scoffed. Sam shot him a look. "Think of it as adult babysitting." Gabriel waggled a bottle of top shelf bourbon from his perch on the TV stand. "With booze!" Right. Buck eyed his new...friend, warily. "Okay, kidnapping adjacent."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Gay Parent Support Group
entry.summary:
Author: K15n

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,457Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 594

Summary: May: it's a weighted voting system, your vote has more weight if you have a queer parent Denny: so i have the most voting power Harry: which usually works out because denny is the most sensible of us May: harry and i get one vote, denny gets two and chris gets an honorary vote Ravi: why an honorary vote? Chris: i have a bisexual buck Denny: duhhhh

entry.title: 'Cause You Love Somebody
entry.summary:
Author: love_me_anyway_118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,334Chapters: 19/19Kudos: 209

Summary: Buck would do anything for Theo, especially adopting him. It wasn't an easy path but Buck was willing. The problem was that Theo had been thorough a lot in a short amount of time and he needed stability in his life right now, which meant two parents and preferably a kid.That wasn't Bucks strong suit.But it was Eddie's.

entry.title: how Could A Body Work Without A Heart?
entry.summary:
Author: mynameismery

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,269Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: “…ddie? Are you still there?” He heard Maddie say. “I’m here,” Eddie said, the words coming out of his mouth easier this time. “Yeah, I’m here. Who’s- who’s hurt?” There was another pause. Like Maddie was preparing herself to say it out loud. “It’s Bobby,” she finally whispered. “Bobby’s gone, Eddie. I’m- I’m sorry.” It wasn’t Buck. It was the first thing that came to Eddie’s mind, and he knew he’d hate himself for it for the rest of his life. Or Based on a Tumblr post/comment, where Eddie gets a call from Maddie in the middle of the night, thinking Buck is dead. When she tells him it was Bobby, he feels relieved, then guilt washes over him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Calling (It's a Choice)
entry.summary:
Author: Will_of_Alexander

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,384Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 257

Summary: Ever since the Diaz boys moved to El Paso, Buck has been estranged from their lives. Eddie first, and then Christopher. He's lived a lot since then. Gotten married, had a kid, gotten divorced. But the second his phone rings with the name "Chris 🦖" Buck knows something is wrong. Will he take the call? Will it become his calling? Does he even have a choice?

entry.title: Different Town
entry.summary:
Author: Kiray

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,611Chapters: 4/39Kudos: 10

Summary: Post-military life as a single father in the city was demanding on a good day. When Eddie realised that his was no longer sustainable, he decided to switch gears completely. Had he ever imagined Christopher and himself in a place like Crescent Falls? Absolutely not. Yet, rediscovering his skills from long before the army, working as a ranch hand for someone called Bobby and meeting a guy named Buck... All of it sent him on a journey, that would end up rattling every aspect of his life. OR the one in which Eddie (closed off, repressed and zeroed in), gives up city life for a ranch in the middle of nowhere to provide for his son and finds way more than he was looking for.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
